name: Ekachai Medical Care Public Company Limited
summary: Ekachai Medical Care Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates Ekachai hospital in Thailand. It offers plastic surgery, fertility and genetic, pediatric, obstertrics and gynaecology, general medicine clinic, general surgery, orthopedics, ophthalmology, emergency, health promotion, hemodialysis, dental, physical, mobile checkup, pre-employment checkup, aesthetic and dermatology center, and child and teen development center services, as well as ambulatory care services for patients with injuries, functional limitations, disability, and diseases. Ekachai Medical Care Public Company Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Muang, Thailand.
